name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: issuing country or postal administration.

entities.name: country
entities.description: Normalized territory for cataloging, filtering, and joins; identifiers should remain stable across inventory and listings.
entities.source: ISO 3166, catalog handbooks, or internal slugs

fields.name: country_id
fields.description: Stable identifier; prefer ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 when practical, otherwise a short mnemonic slug (e.g. dk, ddr).

fields.name: display_name
fields.description: Human-readable country or postal administration name.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Optional clarifications (colonies, period splits, obsolete administrations).

fields.name: ebay_category
fields.description: Optional eBay.com (EBAY_US taxonomy) stamp leaf category id for Browse ``category_ids`` when searching or filtering listings for this country.

fields.name: scott_catalog_entries
fields.description: Optional nested catalog listings for this country (pairs with scott.country_id on scott_catalog_entry, parent_array scott_catalog_entries).
